name: vela-os-roai
description: Vela OS · FPT CX Services — ROAI dashboard on Cloudflare Workers Static Assets, with a read-only Metronome proxy worker.

scripts.dev: npm run build && npx --yes wrangler@4 dev
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx --yes wrangler@4 deploy
scripts.preview: npm run build && npx --yes wrangler@4 versions upload
